revised_content.building_key_prerequisite: Numerator contribution REQUIRES mapping to a stable, unique Building ID from the D-ESS residential building inventory. Records matched spatially but lacking a stable Building ID link may exist for audit purposes but MUST NOT contribute to the building_pv_count numerator.

metric_refinement.pv_installation_count_resolved_building: Count of records matched at Tier 1 (Footprint) or Tier 2 (Buffer).
metric_refinement.pv_installation_count_resolved_context: Count of records matched at Tier 3 (SEG_POLY) only.

revised_content.resolved_metric_rule: The term 'resolved' for building-truth purposes refers strictly to pv_installation_count_resolved_building. User metrics should prioritize this over contextual matches.

revised_content.output_level_clarification: The final deliverable (field_04_real_pv_adoption.parquet) is a segment-level dataset. Record-level attributes (like individual match modes) exist in the staging layer only. The segment-level output must contain aggregated counts (count_match_*) and summary quality indicators.
